sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22924" key="gualoqw/rac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γῠᾰλοθώραξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n22924.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cuirass composed of front- and back-piece</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:10:26:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.26.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
